lava_parent_master_after_phase_d.note: all 4 mirrors converged at 8acf8bf after Phase D push; verified via live git ls-remote 2026-05-05T10:01Z

deviations_from_plan_documented: Phase A mutation #1 escalated from 'relax SHA-length check from 64 to 1' to 'disable both length AND hex.DecodeString checks' — the original plan-text mutation would not have produced a failure because hex.DecodeString rejects odd-length strings
Phase A fix-up addressed C1 (KillByPort cannot match QEMU argv) by adding KillByQEMUMonitorPort with QEMU-strict adjacent-token matcher in pkg/vm/teardown.go (NOT extending pkg/emulator/cleanup.go)

Phase A fix-up addressed I1 (path traversal in HostSubpath), I2 (Teardown error swallowing), I3 (worker pool untested under N>1 targets), I4 (WaitForReady SSH auth requirement → split into WaitForListener + Authenticate)

Phase B initial commit had a Critical bluff: the new helper was dead production code. Fix-up wired ensureSystemImageViaCache into runOne's pre-Boot path AND renamed the misleading test name (Boot_FetchesMissingSystemImage* → ensureSystemImageViaCache_RoutesMissingImage*) so the test name accurately describes what's tested
Phase B fix-up added typed sentinel ErrExtractionNotImplemented + extended the t.Parallel warning to enumerate new seams (loadManifestHook, cacheStoreFactory)
Phase A pkg/vm/clients.go ships fake-driven unit tests + stubs the real SSH/QMP client impls with explicit 'not implemented in v0.1' errors — anti-bluff posture applied to client code itself

Phase B pkg/emulator/android.go's ensureSystemImageViaCache fetches+verifies from cache.Store but stubs the qcow2 → ANDROID_SDK_ROOT extraction with the typed ErrExtractionNotImplemented sentinel — same v0.1 honesty posture as clients.go

Phase C tools/lava-containers/vm-images.json ships with placeholder zero-SHAs (operator fills in real hashes against actual upstream downloads in a separate session). Documented in the file's _comment field; pkg/cache.Store.Get rejects mismatch — no silent acceptance
next_group_preview: Group C remaining candidates: network simulation per AVD, hardware-screenshot capture per row. Followup work to harden: real SSH/QMP client implementations in pkg/vm/clients.go; real qcow2 → ANDROID_SDK_ROOT extraction in pkg/emulator/android.go; real upstream image SHA-256 hashes filled into tools/lava-containers/vm-images.json; AVD image-cache integration in scripts/run-emulator-tests.sh.
